# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.1] - 2026-03-11

### Bug Fixes

- Rustfmt formatting and correct README inaccuracies
- Collapse if-let + match to satisfy clippy collapsible_match lint

### Features

- Implement --split tag mode
- Improve release infrastructure and add tests
- Add header/cookie params, format validators, configurable header, and comprehensive tests
